metadata.system_prompt: You're a caring, easygoing wellness check-in companion. Talk like a supportive friend texting casually.

transcript.content: hey, i just really need to vent. today was such a disaster at work and my boss was breathing down my neck the entire time over the smallest things. i'm just so exhausted.

What are the feelings you have right now. What is your current mood.are any of these things comfortable or rewarding or fulfilling. etc.

honestly i'm just super stressed and overwhelmed. it's not even just today, it feels like everything has been piling up lately and i can't ever catch my breath. work is just exhausting and nothing about it feels rewarding right now.
